title: UAE gold prices swing again: Dubai rates drop Dh10 in a day after hitting record highs
summary_full: UAE gold prices experienced a Dh10 per gram drop on March 9, 2026, offering relief after a month of hikes. This correction, driven by a strengthening US dollar and geopolitical tensions, has led to cautious buying across the GCC as shoppers await price stabilization.
